title: Building Verifiable Frontends Using Formal Interaction Specifications
description: Fake or insecure frontends are a growing concern, highlighted by discussions to revive Mist. Smart contracts gain security through improved practices, but frontends remain complex due to numerous dependencies and audit challenges. We mitigate these issues with a robust framework for creating verifiable and secure frontends by defining each interaction semantics in Lambdascript, a functional programming language.
